summary: Owner granted scoped approval for a future Social OAuth readiness package. This audit template does not execute OAuth, connect accounts, store credentials, post, schedule, pull analytics, use DMs/comments, or activate n8n.
notes: Future OAuth execution remains blocked until exact platform handles are provided, each platform receives separate owner approval, an active approval lock exists, a secure credential storage path is approved, and validation and boot checks pass. This template does not authorize live posting, scheduling, analytics API access, DMs/comments, outbound messaging, n8n activation, paid tools, customer data, production data, domain/DNS changes, Lead Gen changes, AI Receptionist changes, or Constitution changes.
